About Me

He was born in 2000 and is currently enrolled in the Information Science program at Shizuoka University Graduate School of Science and Technology.

He is a member of the Takeuchi Lab., where his primary research focuses on simulating group decision-making processes using reinforcement learning.

In addition to his academic pursuits, Shota enjoys following the NBA and playing basketball.
